title: Verify attributable financial history
preconditions: Representative active transactions, evidence links, deterministic and owner reconciliation decisions, category and pool allocations, payment attribution, transfer and refund relationships, archived identities, and correction cases.
steps: Void and supersede transactions; correct evidence decisions, category, pool, payment attribution, and financial relationships; query history-inclusive projections and backup state.
expected: Every lifecycle event retains stable subjects, prior and resulting state, policy or actor, reason or basis, trusted time, and replacement reference where applicable; prior facts remain immutable; no evidence or attribution moves silently; current exact actuals reconstruct from active history.
